name: Citizens Community Bancorp Inc.
summary: Citizens Community Bancorp, Inc. is a Maryland bank holding company organized in 2004, operating through its wholly-owned subsidiary Citizens Community Federal N.A., a federally chartered National Bank. The Bank serves customers in Wisconsin and Minnesota through 21 full-service branch locations, offering commercial real estate loans, C&I loans, agricultural loans, residential mortgages, home equity lines-of-credit, consumer loans, and a broad range of deposit products including demand deposits, savings accounts, money-market accounts, and certificates of deposit.
